creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Doug Moore from comment #8)
From a short conversation on IRC I believe this is indeed a regression, some driver code is being rebased onto a new FreeBSD, and this behaviour of kmem_alloc_contig() is causing problems because the constraints of the busdma tag aren't being honoured.

(In reply to Sha Faisal from comment #7)
Two more questions: which FreeBSD revision did you upgrade from, and are you running with KASSERTs enabled?
